seo.homeTitle: WhyNot Solutions — Software Development & IT Consulting
seo.homeDescription: WhyNot Solutions is an IT company based in Novi Sad, Serbia, specializing in custom software development and technical consulting. We turn ideas into digital products.
seo.privacyDescription: Privacy Policy of WhyNot Solutions — how we collect, use, and store your data.

hero.headline: Technology solutions
hero.subtext: WhyNot Solutions — Your partner for software development and IT consulting. We turn ideas into digital products.

about.title: About us
about.description: WhyNot Solutions is an IT company specializing in custom software development and technical consulting. We help companies digitalize their operations through modern technologies and proven solutions.

values.title: Quality first
values.description: We treat every project with the same care and dedication, regardless of size.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Open communication and clear deadlines — you always know where your project stands.

values.title: Modern technologies
values.description: We use the latest tools and practices to make your product future-proof.

items.title: Software Development
items.description: Web and mobile applications tailored to your needs — from idea to production.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Strategic advice on technology choices, architecture, and optimization of existing systems.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: Cloud infrastructure setup, CI/CD pipelines, and process automation.

items.title: Data Engineering
items.description: Design and implementation of data pipelines, warehouses, and analytics solutions.

footer.tagline: Your partner for software development and IT consulting.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: WhyNot Solutions, registered in the Republic of Serbia, is the controller of your personal data. For any questions regarding data processing, you can contact us through the contact form on our website.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
sections.content: Through our contact form, we collect: name, email address, and message content. We do not collect any other personal data or use visitor tracking tools.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis and purpose
sections.content: We process your data based on your consent, which you provide by submitting the contact form. The data is used solely to respond to your inquiry.

sections.title: 4. Data sharing
sections.content: We do not share your data with third parties, sell it, or use it for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 5. Data retention
sections.content: We retain your data only as long as necessary to process your inquiry. After that, the data is deleted.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.content: In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act of the Republic of Serbia, you have the right to:
list: Withdraw your consent at any time
sections.afterList: To exercise these rights, contact us through the contact form.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: This website does not use cookies.

sections.title: 8. Policy changes
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy. All changes will be published on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.title: 9. Governing law
sections.content: This privacy policy is governed by the laws of the Republic of Serbia.

sections.title: 1. General provisions
sections.content: By using this website, you accept these terms of service. The website is owned by WhyNot Solutions, registered in the Republic of Serbia.

sections.title: 2. Description of services
sections.content: The website serves as an informational presentation of WhyNot Solutions and its services in software development and technical consulting. The website does not provide online purchasing or user registration capabilities.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual property
sections.content: All content on the website, including text, design, logos, graphics, and source code, is the property of WhyNot Solutions and is protected by copyright law. Copying, distribution, or modification of content without prior written permission is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. User obligations
sections.content: By using the website, you agree not to:
list: Use the website for unlawful purposes
Attempt unauthorized access to the website's systems
Send unsolicited or malicious content through the contact form

sections.title: 5. Contact form
sections.content: By using the contact form, you consent to the processing of data in accordance with our

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.content: The information on the website is for informational purposes only. WhyNot Solutions does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information displayed. WhyNot Solutions is not liable for any damages arising from the use of information on the website.

sections.title: 7. External links
sections.content: The website may contain links to external websites. WhyNot Solutions is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of those websites.

sections.title: 8. Changes to terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms of service at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this page. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 9. Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.content: These terms of service are governed by the laws of the Republic of Serbia. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in the Republic of Serbia.
